Bucket.note: When dependent op needs 'Bucket' param, use for_each=aws.s3.list_object_versions and set Bucket='{{ item.Body }}'

Id.note: When dependent op needs 'Id' param, use for_each=aws.s3.list_bucket_analytics_configurations and set Id='{{ item.Id }}'

Key.note: When dependent op needs 'Key' param, use for_each=aws.s3.list_multipart_uploads and set Key='{{ item.Key }}'

GetBucketAbac.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.AbacStatus.*

GetBucketAccelerateConfiguration.note: Flat emit — access top-level response fields directly

GetBucketAnalyticsConfiguration.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.AnalyticsConfiguration.*

GetBucketEncryption.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration.*

GetBucketIntelligentTieringConfiguration.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.IntelligentTieringConfiguration.*

GetBucketInventoryConfiguration.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.InventoryConfiguration.*

GetBucketLocation.note: Flat emit — access top-level response fields directly

GetBucketLogging.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.LoggingEnabled.*

GetBucketMetadataConfiguration.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.GetBucketMetadataConfigurationResult.*

GetBucketMetadataTableConfiguration.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.GetBucketMetadataTableConfigurationResult.*

GetBucketMetricsConfiguration.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.MetricsConfiguration.*

GetBucketNotification.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.TopicConfiguration.*

GetBucketNotificationConfiguration.note: Multiple list fields — pick primary or emit one per field

GetBucketOwnershipControls.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.OwnershipControls.*

GetBucketPolicy.note: Flat emit — access top-level response fields directly

GetBucketPolicyStatus.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.PolicyStatus.*

GetBucketReplication.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.ReplicationConfiguration.*

GetBucketRequestPayment.note: Flat emit — access top-level response fields directly

GetBucketVersioning.note: Flat emit — access top-level response fields directly

GetObject.note: Flat emit — access top-level response fields directly

GetObjectAttributes.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.Checksum.*

GetObjectLegalHold.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.LegalHold.*

GetObjectLockConfiguration.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.ObjectLockConfiguration.*

GetObjectRetention.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.Retention.*

GetObjectTorrent.note: Flat emit — access top-level response fields directly

GetPublicAccessBlock.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.PublicAccessBlockConfiguration.*
